summary: Retested HIGH opacity bug on /paginas/p-inicio after main agent fix. Performed hard reload (waitUntil=networkidle) and read getComputedStyle of [data-testid=section-band-s-3] before/after pressing [data-testid=section-toggle-s-3]. BUG FIX VERIFIED.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix in EditorPagina.tsx line 55 is correct: opacity: isDragging ? 0.6 : section.visible ? 1 : 0.6 - properly differentiates dragging vs visibility states.
test_credentials: Not required - no auth gate observed on /paginas/p-inicio
context_for_next_testing_agent: Opacity toggle bug on section bands is now resolved. The band element opacity correctly transitions: 1 (visible) -> 0.6 (hidden) -> 1 (visible again) when toggling [data-testid=section-toggle-s-3]. Verified via window.getComputedStyle after hard reload.

rca of the issue.root_cause: Previous logic used `section.visible ? 1 : 0.6` combined with isDragging check incorrectly, OR cached webpack bundle was stale. Current fix on line 55: `opacity: isDragging ? 0.6 : section.visible ? 1 : 0.6` works correctly.
rca of the issue.mitigation: Fix already applied and verified working in production preview URL.
